name: Macaroni Bake, Low Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large pan, sauté onions in margarine until translucent.
3. Add flour and stir until smooth.
4. Gradually whisk in milk, a little at a time, until the mixture thickens.
5. Stir in dill weed, parsley, garlic powder, and pepper.
6. Stir in cottage cheese until well combined.
7. Remove from heat and stir in macaroni.
8. Transfer to a shallow baking dish.
9. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and paprika.
10. Bake for 45 minutes.
